title: [n8n] Unmanned CS: Email Analysis to Custom Reply Pipeline
description: Build an n8n workflow that reads incoming customer support emails, classifies them by type, generates personalized draft replies with Claude, and saves them as Gmail drafts.

steps.title: Set up Gmail trigger
steps.instruction: Create an n8n workflow with a Gmail trigger that fires on new emails in your support inbox.
steps.prompt: How do I set up a Gmail Trigger node in n8n to watch for new emails in a specific label?
steps.expected_result: n8n workflow triggers automatically when a new email arrives in the configured Gmail label
steps.tip: Create a dedicated Gmail label like 'cs-queue' and filter your support email to it

steps.title: Classify the email with Claude
steps.instruction: Add a Claude API call to classify the email into categories: billing, technical, feature request, complaint, or other.
steps.prompt: You are a customer support classifier. Read this email and respond with a JSON object: {category: 'billing|technical|feature_request|complaint|other', urgency: 'high|medium|low', summary: '1 sentence summary'}. Email: {{$json.text}}
steps.expected_result: Each email is classified with a category, urgency level, and summary
steps.tip: Use claude-haiku-4-5 for classification to keep costs low

steps.title: Generate a draft reply
steps.instruction: Based on the classification, generate an appropriate draft reply using Claude.
steps.prompt: You are a professional customer support agent. Write a helpful, empathetic reply to this {{$json.category}} email. Keep it under 100 words. Be specific to their issue. Email: {{$node['Gmail Trigger'].json.text}}
steps.expected_result: A personalized draft reply ready for human review
steps.tip: Always add a human review step — never auto-send customer support replies

steps.title: Save as Gmail draft
steps.instruction: Save the generated reply as a Gmail draft for human review before sending.
steps.prompt: How do I add a Gmail node in n8n to create a draft reply with the generated text?
steps.expected_result: Draft replies appear in Gmail drafts folder within seconds of receiving an email
steps.tip: Add a Slack notification node to alert your team when a new draft is ready for review

challenge: Add a Notion integration that logs all classified emails to a Notion database for tracking response times and common issue patterns.

videos.title: n8n Gmail Customer Support Automation
videos.search_keyword: n8n Gmail customer support automation Claude AI 2026

practicePrompts.label: Email Classification
practicePrompts.prompt: Analyze the following email and classify it as 'Technical Support', 'Billing Inquiry', or 'General Question': 'I need help with my account login.'
practicePrompts.followUp: Try classifying a different email with a unique query.

practicePrompts.label: Generate Reply
practicePrompts.instruction: Create a draft reply using Claude.
practicePrompts.prompt: Generate a personalized draft reply for the email: 'I am having issues with my recent order.'
practicePrompts.followUp: Change the email content and see how the reply varies.

practicePrompts.label: Save as Draft
practicePrompts.prompt: Draft a response for the email: 'Can you provide an update on my support ticket?' and outline how to save it in Gmail.
practicePrompts.followUp: Modify the response structure and check if it affects the saving process.
